ThingDef.label: food trading spot
ThingDef.description: An optional idle position for a pawn whose inventory role focuses on food. Traders still eat, sleep, and do normal work when needed.

ThingDef.label: medicine trading spot
ThingDef.description: An optional idle position for a pawn whose inventory role focuses on medicine.

ThingDef.label: weapons trading spot
ThingDef.description: An optional idle position for a pawn whose inventory role focuses on weapons.

ThingDef.label: apparel trading spot
ThingDef.description: An optional idle position for a pawn whose inventory role focuses on apparel.

ThingDef.label: resources trading spot
ThingDef.description: An optional idle position for a pawn whose inventory role focuses on building resources and bulk goods.

ThingDef.label: misc trading spot
ThingDef.description: An optional idle position for a pawn whose inventory role focuses on mixed goods.
